title: rubus × hirtellus
intro: Rubus × hirtellus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a hybrid plant species within the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus × hirtellus include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Rubus × hirtellus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
